name: panos-mcp
description: MCP server for Palo Alto Networks PanOS firewalls and Panorama

tools.name: get_firewall_info
tools.description: Retrieves system information from the PanOS firewall

tools.name: get_ha_status
tools.description: Retrieves high-availability state and peer information

tools.name: get_active_sessions
tools.description: Retrieves active session count and summary

tools.name: get_system_resources
tools.description: Retrieves system resource utilization (CPU, memory, disk)

tools.name: get_interfaces
tools.description: Retrieves all network interfaces with status and IP addresses

tools.name: get_zones
tools.description: Retrieves all security zones configured on the firewall

tools.name: get_security_profiles
tools.description: Retrieves security profiles (antivirus, vulnerability, spyware, URL filtering)

tools.name: get_address_objects
tools.description: Retrieves all address objects (IP addresses, ranges, FQDNs)

tools.name: get_userid_groups
tools.description: Retrieves user groups known to the firewall

tools.name: get_admin_roles
tools.description: Retrieves administrator role definitions and permissions

tools.name: get_globalprotect_config
tools.description: Retrieves GlobalProtect gateway and portal configuration

tools.name: panorama_get_managed_devices
tools.description: Retrieves all firewalls managed by Panorama

tools.name: panorama_get_device_groups
tools.description: Retrieves all device groups in Panorama

tools.name: panorama_get_template_stacks
tools.description: Retrieves all template stacks in Panorama

tools.name: panorama_get_shared_address_objects
tools.description: Retrieves shared address objects at Panorama level

tools.name: panorama_get_shared_address_groups
tools.description: Retrieves shared address groups at Panorama level

tools.name: panorama_get_shared_service_objects
tools.description: Retrieves shared service objects at Panorama level

tools.name: panorama_get_shared_service_groups
tools.description: Retrieves shared service groups at Panorama level

tools.name: panorama_get_pre_rules
tools.description: Retrieves pre-rules from a device group

tools.name: panorama_get_post_rules
tools.description: Retrieves post-rules from a device group

tools.name: panorama_get_device_group_nat_rules
tools.description: Retrieves NAT rules from a device group

tools.name: panorama_get_log_collectors
tools.description: Retrieves log collector configuration and status

tools.name: panorama_get_push_status
tools.description: Retrieves status of the last configuration push

tools.name: panorama_get_commit_status
tools.description: Retrieves status of pending commits in Panorama

tools.name: panorama_get_managed_device_software
tools.description: Retrieves software versions on managed firewalls

tools.name: panorama_get_shared_security_profiles
tools.description: Retrieves shared security profiles at Panorama level

tools.name: panorama_get_shared_profile_groups
tools.description: Retrieves shared security profile groups at Panorama level

tools.name: get_antivirus_version
tools.description: Retrieves antivirus and threat signature versions

tools.name: get_licenses
tools.description: Retrieves license status and expiration dates

tools.name: set_config
tools.description: Sets or creates configuration at a specific XPath location

tools.name: delete_config
tools.description: Deletes configuration at a specific XPath location

tools.name: commit
tools.description: Commits pending configuration changes to the running firewall

tools.name: panorama_push_to_devices
tools.description: Pushes configuration from Panorama to managed devices

tools.name: run_op_command
tools.description: Executes an arbitrary PanOS operational XML command

tools.name: get_config_xpath
tools.description: Retrieves configuration at a specific XPath location

host.title: Firewall Host
host.description: PanOS firewall or Panorama hostname or IP address

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: PanOS API key — provide this OR username + password below

username.title: Username
username.description: PanOS admin username (used to auto-generate API key if no key provided)

password.title: Password
password.description: PanOS admin password (used to auto-generate API key if no key provided)
